PowerShell($endpoints = @\("news","trends","calendar","signals"\); foreach \($e in $endpoints\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://holoture.com/api/cron/$e" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "$e \(no auth\): $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "$e \(no auth\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
